titleStmt.title: SII 7.880: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 880. (A.R. No. 252 of 1902). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumakaḷ polap perunilaic celviyu(m) n=ta ṉakke Urimai pūṇṭamai maṉakkoḷak kā(ṉ)n=ta ḷurcālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi veṅkaiṉāṭum kaṅkapāṭiyum
nuḷampapāṭiyu(m) n=ta ṭikaivaḻiyum kuṭamalaināṭum kollamum kaliṅkamum Eṇṭicai pukaḻtara Īḻamaṇṭalamum Iraṭṭapāṭi Eḻaraiilakkamu(m) n=ti
ṇṭiṟal veṉṟi taṇṭāṟ koṇṭu taṉneḻil vaḷaru(ḻiyū)ḻiyu ḷellā viyāṇṭu n=to ḻutakai viḷaṅkum yāṇṭe ceḻiyarait tecukoḷ śrīkovirāja
rā jakecaripanma rāna śrīrājarājade vaṟkku yāṇṭu Irupattoṉpatāvatu śrījayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu milāṭāna jaṉanātavaḷanāṭṭuk kuṟukkaikkūṟṟattu
tirukkovalūr tiruviraṭṭānamuṭaiya mātevar pacu nūṟṟaimpatu cāvā muvāp perumpacuvāka Ippacu nūṟṟaimpatuṅ koṇṭu pacu Oṉṟukku pālāḻākkāka nicatam pāl patakki
runāḻi muḻākkup pāl Uccampotu pālāṭiyaruḷa cantrādi ttaval Aṭṭakkaṭava Iṭaiyar tāṉṟi vāñciravaṉum nampūraṉ kiraṉum vaikun=ta ṉ muḷḷiyum kān=ta ṉ Aṇṇāmuṭi Ivviṭaiyar nā
lvarkkum puṇai Ikkūṟṟattu brahmade yam tirukkovalūr sabhai yārum Ikkūṟṟattu brahmade yañ ciṟṟiṅkūr sabh Aiyārum Ikkūṟṟattu brahmade yam Akkaḷamallaccaturvve
timaṅkalattu sabhai yārum Ikkūṟṟattu marutūr Ūrārum Ittiruviraṭṭāṉamuṭaiya mahaāde var tiruvuṇṇāḻikai sabhaiyā raṉaivarum Ide varkku nittal nivan=ta ñ ceyyakkaṭava Iṭaiya raṉaivarum Ipparicu ni
catam patakkkirunāḻi muḻakkup pāl cantrādi ttaval Aṭṭuvikkakkaṭavārkaḷ Ivai panmāheśvara rakṣai Ivai rakṣi ppār śrīpāta n=ta lai melaṉa . pālikkuṅ kovalūr ciṟṟiṅkūr marutūrpati mallam patiṟṟup pattoṭu
patiṟṟaiñcāṉa kālikkup puṇaiyākat tiruvuṇṇāḻikaiyār kaikkoṇṭu kaṟavai Oṉṟā lāḻākkāṅ kaṇakkuk kolik koḷ pāl patineṇṇāḻi muḻakku kkoval viraṭṭarkku mañcaṉamāṭa kkuṭuttāṉ velikkoṉ tiṟaṟ kkam
paṉ viṟal vītiviṭaṅkaṉ ven=ta rpirā ṉarumoḻikku viṇṇappañ ceyte ....
Digital edition of SII 7.880 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
